description:
Smart clipboard actions for Windows — copy, transform, and paste with gestures

WinClip is a lightweight system tray utility that enhances the Windows clipboard
with gesture-driven popups and 52 built-in text actions. Double-click to copy,
drag-select for a floating toolbar, expand for contextual actions — transform case,
format JSON, encode/decode, hash text, extract emails and URLs, convert timestamps,
generate QR codes, and more. $19.99 one-time purchase. All features included.
